things.name: Otago Peninsula
things.description: Wildlife-rich peninsula with Royal Albatross Colony, yellow-eyed penguins and sea lions

things.name: Larnach Castle
things.description: New Zealand's only castle on the hilltop of Otago Peninsula with sea views

things.name: Baldwin Street
things.description: World's steepest residential street - a 35% gradient climbing into the northern suburbs

things.name: Dunedin Railway Station
things.description: Flemish Renaissance 'Gingerbread George' station - New Zealand's most photographed building

things.name: Otago Museum
things.description: Natural history and Pacific culture museum with the unique Discovery World science centre

things.name: Speight's Brewery Tour
things.description: Tour of the 1876 Southern Man's Brewery with tasting of Speight's ales

things.name: The Octagon
things.description: Dunedin's central plaza with the Robert Burns statue and St Paul's Anglican Cathedral

things.name: Taieri Gorge Railway
things.description: Heritage train through spectacular Taieri Gorge on one of the world's greatest rail journeys

things.name: Tunnel Beach
things.description: Hand-carved 19th-century tunnel through sea cliffs to a secluded beach and sandstone arches

things.name: St Clair & St Kilda Beaches
things.description: Southern surf beaches with esplanade, saltwater pool and the best fish and chips
